meanings.definition: United States biochemist noted for developing drugs to treat leukemia and gout (1905-1998)

examples: One foot caught in the stirrup

meanings.definition: walk impeded by some physical limitation or injury
examples: The old woman hobbles down to the store every day

meanings.definition: jump vertically, with legs stiff and back arched
travel by getting free rides from motorists

examples: hitch the trailer to the car
